entries.title: AI Cost Controls — Phase 1 Technical Contract
verified_against: classifier cache + usage log + tests present on main (classifier_cache.go, classifier_usage_log.go, classifier_cache_test.go)
entries.notes: Moved under ai-cost-controls/ in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). Reviewed in PR24H. Phase-1 classifier cost controls (structured JSON usage logs, bounded TTL exact-result cache, real token capture) are present on main in classifier_cache.go + classifier_usage_log.go with tests; the doc's 'not merged' header is now outdated. Implementation-backed.
